summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Next.js 15 spiritual website for Swami Avdheshanand Giri Ji Maharaj. All major functionality working correctly including responsive design, navigation, and page loading across desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports.

design_issues.issue: Section selector not found during automated testing - may need verification

passed_tests: Homepage loads with all required sections (Hero, About, Core Teachings, Gallery, Events, Contact, FAQ)
Desktop navigation with Wisdom Library dropdown menu working
Mobile hamburger menu opens/closes smoothly with all navigation items
Donate page loads with 4 donation causes displayed correctly
Videos page displays 12 video cards in responsive grid
Books page displays 25 book cards with proper layout
Volunteer page loads with 5 form inputs for registration
Responsive design works across desktop (1920px), tablet (768px), mobile (390px)
WhatsApp floating button visible, clickable, and shows tooltip on hover
Smooth scroll animations working for navigation
Page transitions and navigation between all pages working
Gallery and Schedule pages load correctly
Mobile menu navigation and page routing functional
